message:
fix(jira): input validation against path injection, server-driven Retry-After, and max_results capping

Security and robustness improvements to the Jira connector:

- Add validate_issue_key/validate_project_key/validate_id guards that
  reject any user-supplied key/ID containing characters outside
  [A-Za-z0-9_-] before URL interpolation, closing a class of
  path-traversal/injection bugs
- Add InvalidInput error variant (non-retryable, maps to FcpError code 1003)
- Parse actual Retry-After header from HTTP response before consuming the
  body instead of hardcoding 60s, applied across all five retry-loop call
  sites (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, attachment upload)
- Cap max_results at 1000 in JQL search, list sprints, list comments,
  and list worklogs to prevent unbounded response sizes
- Fix lifecycle_shutdown_clean test (let -> let mut) for changed signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
